components.name: ability-action-bar
components.title: Ability Action Bar
components.description: Action Bar wired to a live AbilityKit — derives slot state, cooldown, and charges from engine snapshots each tick.

components.name: ability-slot
components.title: Ability Slot
components.description: Four-state ability slot button — ready, cooldown (conic sweep + timer), no-resource, locked — with charge pips, just-cast flash, and a corner keybind badge.

components.name: accent-rule
components.title: Accent Rule
components.description: Thin glowing gradient divider used under panel headers and section breaks.

components.name: action-bar
components.title: Action Bar
components.description: Row of ability slot buttons driven by a plain slot-data array — presentational, value-driven.

components.name: ammo-counter
components.title: Ammo Counter
components.description: Magazine/reserve ammo readout with a low-ammo pulse, a reloading label, and a slanted divider between magazine and reserve counts.

components.name: announcement-banner
components.title: Announcement Banner
components.description: Centered match-event banner (victory/defeat/warning/neutral) with an accent rule and optional keybind hint.

components.name: arc-gauge
components.title: Arc Gauge
components.description: SVG sweep-arc gauge with tick marks, a glowing progress stroke in accent/danger/warning tones, and a centered readout + label.

components.name: boss-bar
components.title: Boss Bar
components.description: Wide boss health bar with finial end-caps, phase-transition ticks, a name, and a sub-label.

components.name: break-meter
components.title: Break Meter
components.description: Compact stagger/poise break meter that ramps color with fill and shakes and pulses when broken.

components.name: buff-tray
components.title: Buff Tray
components.description: Row of chamfered buff/debuff chips with stack counts and a remaining-duration underline, driven by a plain chip array.

components.name: cast-bar
components.title: Cast Bar
components.description: Slant-clipped cast/channel progress bar with a bright leading edge and an interrupted state.

components.name: charge-meter
components.title: Charge Meter
components.description: Slant-clipped charge or ultimate meter with tier ticks and a ready-state glow animation.

components.name: chat-bubble
components.title: Chat Bubble
components.description: Over-entity speech bubble for proximity chat — presentational, value-driven.

components.name: combat-float-layer
components.title: Combat Float Layer
components.description: Absolute-positioned layer of animated damage/heal/crit/info/error text floats, each jittered around a screen position — presentational, list-driven.

components.name: combat-log-panel
components.title: Combat Log Panel
components.description: Auto-scrolling tone-colored combat log in a titled panel — damage/heal/system lines fade with age, value-driven.

components.name: combo-counter
components.title: Combo Counter
components.description: Big pop-animated combo count with a HUD label and an optional decaying progress bar.

components.name: crafting-panel
components.title: Crafting Panel
components.description: Recipe list panel with per-input have/need coloring and an in-progress craft-fraction bar under each recipe.

components.name: currency-display
components.title: Currency Display
components.description: Coin-glyph currency readout with optional compact k/m/b formatting and a currency name label — presentational, value-driven.

components.name: damage-direction-indicator
components.title: Damage Direction Indicator
components.description: Screen-edge arc that flashes toward the source of incoming damage, scaled by intensity.

components.name: death-overlay-bound
components.title: Death Overlay Bound
components.description: DeathScreenView bound to the local player's dead state via useLocalPlayerDead — renders nothing while alive.

components.name: death-screen-view
components.title: Death Screen View
components.description: Presentational death overlay with a popping title, respawn countdown or respawn MenuButton — value-driven, no engine reads.

components.name: dialogue-panel
components.title: Dialogue Panel
components.description: Notched dialogue box with speaker nameplate, portrait well, and skill-check-annotated branching choices.

components.name: entity-chat-bubble
components.title: Entity Chat Bubble
components.description: ChatBubble bound to a live entity's latest proximity chat message via useEntityChatBubble — the one-line speech bubble for any entity instance.

components.name: entity-vital-bar
components.title: Entity Vital Bar
components.description: VitalBar bound to a live entity stat via useEntityStat — the one-line health bar for any entity instance.

components.name: equipment-doll
components.title: Equipment Doll
components.description: Paper-doll figure flanked by left/right/bottom equipment slot wells, rarity-tinted by occupied item.

components.name: event-charge-meter
components.title: Event Charge Meter
components.description: ChargeMeter bound to a live EventMeter via useEventMeter — the one-line charge bar for combo/ultimate/hype meters.

components.name: feed-combat-log
components.title: Feed Combat Log
components.description: CombatLogPanel bound to a live game feed action via useFeed, mapped through a mapLine() projector.

components.name: feed-kill-feed
components.title: Feed Kill Feed
components.description: KillFeed bound to a live game feed action via useFeed, mapping raw feed entries to kill-feed rows.

components.name: feed-pickup-toasts
components.title: Feed Pickup Toasts
components.description: PickupToastStack bound to a live game feed action via useFeed, mapping raw feed entries to pickup toasts.

components.name: game-event-floats
components.title: Game Event Floats
components.description: CombatFloatLayer wired to the entity.floatText game event via useGame — spawns and auto-expires floats from live combat.

components.name: heart-row
components.title: Heart Row
components.description: Row of heart pips for discrete lives or health, with an optional custom icon renderer.

components.name: hit-marker
components.title: Hit Marker
components.description: Crosshair X-mark flash that pulses on a hit, brighter and larger on crit — presentational, active/crit-driven.

components.name: hotbar-selector
components.title: Hotbar Selector
components.description: Numbered hotbar slots with a selection caret and scale-up highlight for the active index.

components.name: hud-label
components.title: Hud Label
components.description: Small uppercase tracked-letterspacing caption for HUD field headers and table columns.

components.name: hud-marker-layer
components.title: Hud Marker Layer
components.description: Renders a full-screen layer of WaypointMarker instances from a list of HUD markers.

components.name: hud-panel
components.title: Hud Panel
components.description: Corner-bracketed HUD panel shell with a chamfer-free titled header — the base chrome every panel/overlay stacks on.

components.name: interaction-ring
components.title: Interaction Ring
components.description: Circular interact-hold progress ring with a center keybind badge and optional label.

components.name: inventory-slot-grid
components.title: Inventory Slot Grid
components.description: Item Grid wired to a live inventory container — maps engine InventorySlot state to grid slots each render.

components.name: item-grid
components.title: Item Grid
components.description: Rarity-tinted inventory/loot grid of clickable slots, driven by a plain slot-data array — presentational, value-driven.

components.name: journal-quest-tracker
components.title: Journal Quest Tracker
components.description: QuestTracker bound to the live quest journal via useQuestJournal, mapped through a describe() projector.

components.name: keybind-badge
components.title: Keybind Badge
components.description: Chamfered key-cap badge for showing a binding on its own control — hotbar slot corners, panel toggles.

components.name: kill-feed
components.title: Kill Feed
components.description: Right-aligned scrolling feed of kill/elimination rows with friendly/hostile coloring and an accent highlight bar — presentational, list-driven.

components.name: level-up-splash
components.title: Level Up Splash
components.description: Radial-glow level-up splash that flashes in on the stat.levelUp game event via useGame and auto-dismisses.

components.name: loading-screen
components.title: Loading Screen
components.description: Full-screen loading card with a slant-clipped determinate progress bar or an indeterminate sheen sweep, plus an optional rotating tip line.

components.name: lock-on-marker
components.title: Lock-On Marker
components.description: Rotating corner-bracket lock-on reticle that snaps into a diamond frame when a target is acquired, with an optional label.

components.name: loop-dial
components.title: Loop Dial
components.description: Radial position-around-a-loop dial: markers at cycle fractions plus live/forecast arc windows — laps, patrols, rotation schedules.

components.name: loot-card
components.title: Loot Card
components.description: Rarity-bordered item tooltip card with icon, stat lines, italic affixes, and flavor text.

components.name: match-timer
components.title: Match Timer
components.description: MM:SS countdown clock with tick flanks and warning/critical color states, bundled with CountdownPips, a large pop-in number for a pre-round countdown.

components.name: menu-button
components.title: Menu Button
components.description: Slant-clipped menu button with primary/ghost/danger variants and an optional corner keybind badge.

components.name: menu-list
components.title: Menu List
components.description: Keyboard/pointer-navigable vertical menu with a selection wedge, accent underline, and per-entry keybind badges.

components.name: moodle-tray
components.title: Moodle Tray
components.description: Buff Tray adapter for survival-game Moodle records — maps severity to buff/debuff tint and fraction to the duration ring.

components.name: mount
components.title: Mount
components.description: One-call React root mount for a PlayableGame: mountGame(game) renders GameHost into #root.

components.name: objective-channel
components.title: Objective Channel
components.description: Slant-clipped capture/channel progress bar with friendly/hostile/neutral ownership tinting and a contested pulse.

components.name: pause-screen
components.title: Pause Screen
components.description: Blurred full-screen pause overlay with a title and a MenuList of entries.

components.name: pickup-toast-stack
components.title: Pickup Toast Stack
components.description: Stacked, fading pickup toasts with rarity-tinted icon/label/count — presentational, list-driven.

components.name: playing-card
components.title: Playing Card
components.description: French-deck card face with rank, suit pips, and a patterned back when face-down, plus an overlapping stack.

components.name: progress-strip
components.title: Progress Strip
components.description: Linear 1D minimap: lanes with moving markers and live/forecast segments — race standings along a lap, couriers along a line.

components.name: quest-tracker
components.title: Quest Tracker
components.description: Stacked objective-list HUD widget — quest title rule plus checkable/countable objective rows, value-driven.

components.name: race-position
components.title: Race Position
components.description: Large ordinal position readout (1st/2nd/3rd) with an optional field-size suffix and a lap counter label.

components.name: rank-list
components.title: Rank List
components.description: Ranked leaderboard rows in a titled panel — gold star on first place, alternating row shading, value-driven.

components.name: resource-orb
components.title: Resource Orb
components.description: Circular fill-from-bottom resource orb (mana, stamina, and other tones) with a percentage readout.

components.name: results-screen
components.title: Results Screen
components.description: Victory/defeat/draw results overlay with an animated outcome title, a two-column stat grid, and an optional MenuList.

components.name: reticle
components.title: Reticle
components.description: Configurable crosshair reticle — dot, cross, circle, chevron, or shotgun spread pattern — with an optional hit-flash tick overlay.

components.name: schematic-diagram
components.title: Schematic Diagram
components.description: Fixed-panel node+edge schematic independent of world positions — circuit layouts, rail networks, heist floor plans, with dashed forecast edges.

components.name: score-readout
components.title: Score Readout
components.description: Zero-padded score counter that splits leading zeros from significant digits, with a pop-in animation on value change.

components.name: scoreboard-overlay
components.title: Scoreboard Overlay
components.description: Full-screen modal scoreboard with configurable columns, numeric-aware alignment, and highlight/team-color row accents.

components.name: settings-group
components.title: Settings Group
components.description: Titled settings section with an accent rule underline, wrapping SliderRow/ToggleRow children in a vertical stack.

components.name: slider-row
components.title: Slider Row
components.description: Labeled pointer-draggable slant-clipped slider row with a formatted value readout — settings-menu style.

components.name: stat-leaderboard
components.title: Stat Leaderboard
components.description: RankList bound to a live stat leaderboard via useLeaderboard, with optional userId-to-display-name resolution.

components.name: streak-callout
components.title: Streak Callout
components.description: Italic, skewed streak callout that intensifies size/color/pulse at higher tiers.

components.name: target-frame
components.title: Target Frame
components.description: Reversed UnitFrame with hostile/friendly/neutral relation coloring for an enemy or NPC target.

components.name: team-score-board
components.title: Team Score Board
components.description: Two-team score comparison with a diamond divider, per-team name labels, and an optional round label — presentational, value-driven.

components.name: title-screen
components.title: Title Screen
components.description: Full-screen title card with headline, subtitle, optional backdrop layer, version tag, and a MenuList of entries.

components.name: toggle-row
components.title: Toggle Row
components.description: Labeled two-segment on/off toggle row rendered as slant-clipped chips — settings-menu style.

components.name: unit-frame
components.title: Unit Frame
components.description: Portrait, name, level rosette, and stacked vital bars for a player or party-member HUD frame.

components.name: vendor-panel
components.title: Vendor Panel
components.description: Shop listing panel with rarity-colored item names, stock counts, affordability-aware pricing, and a balance readout.

components.name: vital-bar
components.title: Vital Bar
components.description: Slant-clipped stat bar with damage ghost-trail, segment ticks, and health/mana/stamina/xp/shield tones — presentational, value-driven.

components.name: wallet-currency-display
components.title: Wallet Currency Display
components.description: CurrencyDisplay bound to a live wallet balance via useCurrency — the one-line currency readout for any currency id.

components.name: wave-indicator
components.title: Wave Indicator
components.description: Wave-number readout with an accent underline and an optional remaining-hostiles counter for horde/survival modes.

components.name: waypoint-marker
components.title: Waypoint Marker
components.description: World-space HUD marker for objectives, danger, allies, or loot, with an off-screen clamp arrow, label, and distance readout.

components.name: xp-bar
components.title: Xp Bar
components.description: Thin tick-marked experience bar with an optional level readout.
